summary: Iteration 27 testing complete. All new 360Player-style Phase 2 features (Training Sessions, Player Development Plans, Player Evaluations) are working correctly. Backend APIs all pass (17/17 tests). Frontend UI verified with all new tabs and panels accessible and functional.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27 added 3 major new admin features inside existing drill-down views: 1) Training Sessions Panel - appears as 'Προπονήσεις' sub-tab in both Teams and Academy drill-downs (between Πρόγραμμα/Αγώνες and Staff/Γκαλερί). Features: session CRUD with title, date, duration, intensity (low/medium/high), tags (possession, attacking, defending, 1v1, set_pieces, fitness, shooting, passing, goalkeeping), exercises (name, description, duration, equipment), notes. 2) Player Development Panel - appears in AdminPlayerProfile below player info cards. Features: development goals with title, category (technical/tactical/physical/mental), description, target date, milestones (toggleable completion), progress tracking (auto-calculated from milestones). 3) Player Evaluation Panel - appears in AdminPlayerProfile below player info cards. Features: evaluations with period, 5 rating sliders (1-10) for technical/tactical/physical/mental/teamwork, overall score (auto-calculated average), strengths, areas to improve, coach notes, trend comparison with previous evaluation. All backend APIs tested: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/training-sessions, POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/players/{id}/development, POST/GET/DELETE /api/admin/players/{id}/evaluations. Academy group U12 ID: 7dda3b6a-afc6-48d2-9f64-8907533c2f34.

training_sessions_backend.details: POST /api/admin/training-sessions creates session with exercises, tags, intensity. GET /api/admin/training-sessions?academy_group_id= returns sessions. PUT updates session. DELETE removes session.

training_sessions_frontend.details: Προπονήσεις tab visible in Teams drill-down (between Πρόγραμμα and Staff) and Academy drill-down (between Αγώνες and Γκαλερί). TrainingSessionsPanel shows session list, add button, form modal with title, date, duration, intensity selector, tag pills, exercises list.

player_development_backend.details: POST /api/admin/players/{id}/development creates goal with milestones. GET returns goals list. PUT updates progress and milestones. DELETE removes goal.

player_development_frontend.details: ΠΛΑΝΟ ΑΝΑΠΤΥΞΗΣ panel visible in AdminPlayerProfile below info cards. Shows active goals with progress bars, milestones (toggleable), completed goals section. Add Goal button opens form modal with title, category buttons, target date, milestones list.

player_evaluation_backend.details: POST /api/admin/players/{id}/evaluations creates evaluation with 5 ratings (1-10). GET returns evaluations list. DELETE removes evaluation. Overall score calculated as average of 5 categories.

player_evaluation_frontend.details: ΑΞΙΟΛΟΓΗΣΕΙΣ panel visible in AdminPlayerProfile below info cards. Shows evaluation cards with overall score, 5 rating bars (Τεχνική, Τακτική, Φυσική, Ψυχολογία, Ομαδικότητα), strengths/improvements/notes sections, trend indicator vs previous. Add Evaluation button opens form modal with period input, 5 rating sliders, text areas.

existing_features_regression.details: Calendar, Attendance, Wall Posts, Dashboard, Academy Groups endpoints all working correctly.
